title: ilex engleriana
intro: Ilex engleriana, also known as the Chinese holly or Engler's holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Ilex engleriana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
